dashboard.label: Agent Flight Recorder
dashboard.description: Immutable audit trail of every action taken by the nine Aegis Foundry agents. Each event is one JSON line: seq, ts, agent, action and a structured detail payload.

search.query: index=aegis_audit sourcetype="aegis:flight_recorder" | timechart count by agent

index=aegis_audit sourcetype="aegis:flight_recorder" (action="approval_requested" OR action="decision_recorded") | stats count(eval(action="approval_requested")) as requested count(eval(action="decision_recorded")) as decided | eval pending=max(requested - decided, 0) | fields pending
index=aegis_audit sourcetype="aegis:flight_recorder" | spath output=detail path=detail | table seq, ts, agent, action, detail | sort 0 - seq
